_meta.description: Pillar 2 workflow templates — full V2 export for seeding

templates.description: Register the group or constituent entity for Pillar 2 compliance in the relevant jurisdiction.

tasks.name: Review registration requirements
tasks.description: Identify the local registration threshold, deadline, and required entities for Pillar 2 compliance.

checklist.text: Identify the registration threshold and due date
Confirm which entities need to register
Confirm registration form or portal availability

tasks.name: Gather registration information
tasks.description: Collect entity legal details, tax IDs, and contact information needed for the registration form.

checklist.text: Collect legal entity names and tax IDs
Confirm UPE or filing entity designation

tasks.name: Submit registration
tasks.description: Complete and submit the registration form to the relevant tax authority and obtain confirmation.

checklist.text: Obtain registration confirmation or reference number

evidence.name: Registration confirmation / receipt
evidence.description: Official confirmation or reference number from the tax authority confirming successful registration.

evidence.name: Completed registration form
evidence.description: Copy of the submitted registration form or portal screenshot.

evidence.name: Entity list submitted
evidence.description: List of constituent entities included in the registration.

evidence.name: UPE / filing entity designation letter
evidence.description: Letter or form confirming the designated filing entity, where required by the jurisdiction.

evidence.name: Power of attorney or agent authorisation
evidence.description: Authorisation for an adviser or agent to register on behalf of the group, if applicable.

evidence.name: Tax ID confirmation
evidence.description: Official documentation confirming the entity tax identification number.

evidence.name: Internal approval of registration
evidence.description: Internal sign-off or email trail confirming approval to register.

evidence.name: Adviser registration memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo summarising registration requirements and approach, where relevant.

evidence.name: Correspondence with tax authority
evidence.description: Any correspondence with the tax authority regarding the registration process.

templates.description: Calculate and remit the Pillar 2 top-up tax payment to the relevant tax authority.

tasks.name: Calculate payment amount
tasks.description: Determine the final payment amount by verifying the top-up tax liability from the filed return and applying any credits or offsets.

checklist.text: Verify top-up tax liability from filed return
Apply credits, offsets, or instalments if applicable
Confirm payment currency and exchange rate
Reconcile payment amount to return schedules

tasks.name: Initiate payment
tasks.description: Arrange the bank transfer or payment instruction to the tax authority and confirm the payment has cleared.

checklist.text: Complete bank transfer with tax reference
File payment confirmation with obligation record

evidence.name: Payment confirmation / receipt
evidence.description: Official receipt or confirmation from the tax authority that payment has been received.

evidence.name: Bank transfer receipt
evidence.description: Bank statement or transfer confirmation showing the payment was made.

evidence.name: Payment calculation workbook
evidence.description: Workbook or spreadsheet showing how the payment amount was derived from the return.

evidence.name: FX rate documentation
evidence.description: Evidence of the exchange rate used for currency conversion, where applicable.

evidence.name: Internal payment approval
evidence.description: Internal sign-off or authorisation confirming approval of the payment amount.

evidence.name: Instalment schedule
evidence.description: Schedule of instalment payments, if the jurisdiction allows or requires payment in instalments.

evidence.name: Credit or offset documentation
evidence.description: Documentation supporting any credits, offsets, or prior-year adjustments applied to the payment.

evidence.name: Reconciliation to return
evidence.description: Reconciliation showing the payment matches the liability on the filed return.

evidence.name: Tax authority correspondence
evidence.description: Any correspondence with the tax authority regarding payment arrangements or queries.

evidence.name: Treasury memo
evidence.description: Internal treasury memo documenting funding, currency, and timing decisions.

templates.description: Prepare and file a Pillar 2 tax return (generic template used when no specific return type template exists).

tasks.name: Confirm applicability
tasks.description: Review the filing threshold, identify the filing entity, and confirm the obligation applies for this jurisdiction and year.

tasks.name: Collect financial data
tasks.description: Extract the financial data needed for the return, including general ledger data, consolidation adjustments, and entity-level detail.

checklist.text: Extract general ledger data per entity
Collect entity ownership and structure data

tasks.name: Calculate ETR and top-up tax
tasks.description: Apply GloBE income and covered tax adjustments to calculate the jurisdiction-level effective tax rate and determine any top-up tax liability.

tasks.name: Prepare return
tasks.description: Complete the return schedules, populate the filing form, and prepare supporting calculations.

checklist.text: Validate return against schema or form requirements

tasks.name: Review and approve
tasks.description: Senior tax review of the return and calculations, with external adviser review where required.

checklist.text: Senior tax review of return and calculations

tasks.name: File return
tasks.description: Submit the return via the tax portal and obtain filing confirmation.

evidence.name: Filed return (PDF or XML)
evidence.description: Copy of the submitted return in the format accepted by the tax authority.

evidence.name: Filing receipt
evidence.description: Official filing receipt or confirmation from the tax authority.

evidence.name: ETR calculation workbook
evidence.description: Workbook showing the jurisdiction-level effective tax rate calculation, including GloBE income and covered tax adjustments.

evidence.name: Top-up tax calculation
evidence.description: Workbook or schedule showing how the top-up tax liability was determined.

evidence.name: GloBE income adjustments schedule
evidence.description: Schedule documenting the adjustments applied to arrive at GloBE income.

evidence.name: Covered tax adjustments schedule
evidence.description: Schedule documenting the adjustments applied to covered taxes.

evidence.name: Senior review sign-off
evidence.description: Internal sign-off by the senior reviewer or authorised signatory.

evidence.name: Source data pack
evidence.description: Pack of source financial data (GL extracts, trial balances) used to prepare the return.

evidence.name: Substance-based income exclusion calculation
evidence.description: Calculation of the substance-based income exclusion (payroll and tangible assets), where applicable.

evidence.name: External adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo reviewing the return and key technical positions, where relevant.

evidence.name: Reconciliation to financial statements
evidence.description: Reconciliation of return data to audited financial statements.

evidence.name: Elections register extract
evidence.description: Extract from the elections register showing elections relevant to this return, if applicable.

evidence.name: Data quality checks
evidence.description: Evidence of data quality checks performed on source data.

evidence.name: Return preparation working papers
evidence.description: Detailed working papers documenting the return preparation process.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Correspondence with the tax authority regarding this return.

templates.description: Prepare and file the Qualified Domestic Minimum Top-up Tax return for the jurisdiction.

tasks.name: Confirm applicability
tasks.description: Review the filing threshold, identify the filing entity, and confirm the obligation applies for this jurisdiction and year.

tasks.name: Collect financial data
tasks.description: Extract the financial data needed for the return, including general ledger data, consolidation adjustments, and entity-level detail.

checklist.text: Extract general ledger data per entity
Collect entity ownership and structure data

tasks.name: Calculate QDMTT liability
tasks.description: Calculate the QDMTT liability using the jurisdiction-specific QDMTT rules, including any local adjustments or safe harbour provisions.

checklist.text: Apply local QDMTT covered tax adjustments
Apply QDMTT safe harbour, where applicable
Compare QDMTT to GloBE calculation for consistency

tasks.name: Prepare return
tasks.description: Complete the return schedules, populate the filing form, and prepare supporting calculations.

checklist.text: Validate return against schema or form requirements

tasks.name: Review and approve
tasks.description: Senior tax review of the return and calculations, with external adviser review where required.

checklist.text: Senior tax review of return and calculations

tasks.name: File return
tasks.description: Submit the return via the tax portal and obtain filing confirmation.

evidence.name: Filed QDMTT return (PDF or XML)
evidence.description: Copy of the submitted QDMTT return in the format accepted by the tax authority.

evidence.name: Filing receipt
evidence.description: Official filing receipt or confirmation from the tax authority.

evidence.name: ETR calculation workbook
evidence.description: Workbook showing the jurisdiction-level effective tax rate calculation, including GloBE income and covered tax adjustments.

evidence.name: Top-up tax calculation
evidence.description: Workbook or schedule showing how the top-up tax liability was determined.

evidence.name: QDMTT-specific calculation workbook
evidence.description: Workbook showing the QDMTT-specific income and tax calculations, including any local adjustments.

evidence.name: QDMTT vs GloBE reconciliation
evidence.description: Reconciliation comparing the QDMTT calculation to the GloBE calculation to identify and explain differences.

evidence.name: QDMTT safe harbour assessment
evidence.description: Assessment of whether the QDMTT safe harbour applies and supporting calculations, where applicable.

evidence.name: GloBE income adjustments schedule
evidence.description: Schedule documenting the adjustments applied to arrive at GloBE income.

evidence.name: Covered tax adjustments schedule
evidence.description: Schedule documenting the adjustments applied to covered taxes.

evidence.name: Senior review sign-off
evidence.description: Internal sign-off by the senior reviewer or authorised signatory.

evidence.name: Source data pack
evidence.description: Pack of source financial data (GL extracts, trial balances) used to prepare the return.

evidence.name: Substance-based income exclusion calculation
evidence.description: Calculation of the substance-based income exclusion (payroll and tangible assets), where applicable.

evidence.name: External adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo reviewing the return and key technical positions, where relevant.

evidence.name: Reconciliation to financial statements
evidence.description: Reconciliation of return data to audited financial statements.

evidence.name: Elections register extract
evidence.description: Extract from the elections register showing elections relevant to this return, if applicable.

evidence.name: Data quality checks
evidence.description: Evidence of data quality checks performed on source data.

evidence.name: Return preparation working papers
evidence.description: Detailed working papers documenting the return preparation process.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Correspondence with the tax authority regarding this return.

templates.description: Prepare and file the Income Inclusion Rule return for the UPE or intermediate parent entity jurisdiction.

tasks.name: Confirm applicability
tasks.description: Review the filing threshold, identify the filing entity, and confirm the obligation applies for this jurisdiction and year.

tasks.name: Collect financial data
tasks.description: Extract the financial data needed for the return, including general ledger data, consolidation adjustments, and entity-level detail.

checklist.text: Extract general ledger data per entity
Collect entity ownership and structure data

tasks.name: Calculate IIR top-up tax
tasks.description: Calculate the IIR top-up tax by determining the allocable share of top-up tax for low-taxed constituent entities.

checklist.text: Calculate allocable share of top-up tax
Apply ownership chain and holding structure
Net off QDMTT credits, where applicable

tasks.name: Prepare return
tasks.description: Complete the return schedules, populate the filing form, and prepare supporting calculations.

checklist.text: Validate return against schema or form requirements

evidence.description: Schedule showing QDMTT credits offset against IIR liability, where applicable.

evidence.name: GloBE income adjustments schedule
evidence.description: Schedule documenting the adjustments applied to arrive at GloBE income.

evidence.name: Covered tax adjustments schedule

templates.description: Prepare and file the Undertaxed Profits Rule return for the jurisdiction.

tasks.name: Confirm applicability
tasks.description: Review the filing threshold, identify the filing entity, and confirm the obligation applies for this jurisdiction and year.

tasks.name: Collect financial data
tasks.description: Extract the financial data needed for the return, including general ledger data, consolidation adjustments, and entity-level detail.

checklist.text: Extract general ledger data per entity
Collect entity ownership and structure data

tasks.name: Calculate UTPR top-up tax
tasks.description: Calculate the UTPR top-up tax allocation based on the jurisdiction's share of employees and tangible assets.

checklist.text: Identify residual top-up tax after IIR
Calculate UTPR allocation (employees and tangible assets)
Apply UTPR percentage to determine jurisdiction allocation
Net off QDMTT and IIR credits

tasks.name: Prepare return
tasks.description: Complete the return schedules, populate the filing form, and prepare supporting calculations.

checklist.text: Validate return against schema or form requirements

templates.templateName: Combined local top-up tax return workflow
templates.description: Prepare and file a combined local top-up tax return covering multiple Pillar 2 charging mechanisms (e.g. QDMTT + IIR or QDMTT + UTPR) in a single filing.

tasks.name: Confirm applicability
tasks.description: Review the filing threshold, identify the filing entity, and confirm the obligation applies for this jurisdiction and year.

tasks.name: Collect financial data
tasks.description: Extract the financial data needed for the return, including general ledger data, consolidation adjustments, and entity-level detail.

checklist.text: Extract general ledger data per entity
Collect entity ownership and structure data

tasks.name: Calculate combined top-up tax
tasks.description: Calculate the combined top-up tax liability covering all applicable charging mechanisms in the jurisdiction.

checklist.text: Calculate IIR / UTPR component, if applicable

tasks.name: Prepare return
tasks.description: Complete the return schedules, populate the filing form, and prepare supporting calculations.

checklist.text: Validate return against schema or form requirements

tasks.name: Review and approve
tasks.description: Senior tax review of the return and calculations, with external adviser review where required.

checklist.text: Senior tax review of return and calculations

tasks.name: File return
tasks.description: Submit the return via the tax portal and obtain filing confirmation.

evidence.name: Filed combined return (PDF or XML)
evidence.description: Copy of the submitted combined return in the format accepted by the tax authority.

evidence.name: Filing receipt
evidence.description: Official filing receipt or confirmation from the tax authority.

evidence.name: ETR calculation workbook
evidence.description: Workbook showing the jurisdiction-level effective tax rate calculation, including GloBE income and covered tax adjustments.

evidence.name: Top-up tax calculation
evidence.description: Workbook or schedule showing how the top-up tax liability was determined.

evidence.name: Combined calculation workbook
evidence.description: Workbook showing the combined calculation across all charging mechanisms.

evidence.name: Component reconciliation
evidence.description: Reconciliation showing how each component (QDMTT, IIR, UTPR) contributes to the combined total.

evidence.name: Local adjustment schedule
evidence.description: Schedule of local adjustments and credits applied, where applicable.

evidence.name: GloBE income adjustments schedule
evidence.description: Schedule documenting the adjustments applied to arrive at GloBE income.

evidence.name: Covered tax adjustments schedule
evidence.description: Schedule documenting the adjustments applied to covered taxes.

evidence.name: Senior review sign-off
evidence.description: Internal sign-off by the senior reviewer or authorised signatory.

evidence.name: Source data pack
evidence.description: Pack of source financial data (GL extracts, trial balances) used to prepare the return.

evidence.name: Substance-based income exclusion calculation
evidence.description: Calculation of the substance-based income exclusion (payroll and tangible assets), where applicable.

evidence.name: External adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo reviewing the return and key technical positions, where relevant.

evidence.name: Reconciliation to financial statements
evidence.description: Reconciliation of return data to audited financial statements.

evidence.name: Elections register extract
evidence.description: Extract from the elections register showing elections relevant to this return, if applicable.

evidence.name: Data quality checks
evidence.description: Evidence of data quality checks performed on source data.

evidence.name: Return preparation working papers
evidence.description: Detailed working papers documenting the return preparation process.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Correspondence with the tax authority regarding this return.

templates.description: Prepare and file the GloBE Information Return on behalf of the group via the central filing entity (UPE or designated filing entity).

tasks.name: Confirm central filing arrangement
tasks.description: Verify the designated filing entity (UPE or DFE), confirm the list of constituent entities covered, and validate the central filing route.

checklist.text: Verify designation of filing entity (UPE or DFE)
Confirm constituent entities covered by central filing
Confirm qualifying competent authority agreements in place

tasks.name: Collect group-wide GIR data
tasks.description: Gather entity-level financial data for all jurisdictions, including revenue, GloBE income, covered taxes, and employee headcount.

checklist.text: Collect revenue, income, tax and employee data per jurisdiction

tasks.name: Prepare GIR
tasks.description: Complete the GIR XML or electronic return, including all required schedules, and validate against the OECD schema.

checklist.text: Complete GIR XML template or form
Validate GIR file against OECD schema

tasks.name: Review and approve GIR
tasks.description: Senior tax review of the GIR content, including external adviser review where required.

checklist.text: Senior tax review of GIR content

tasks.name: File GIR centrally
tasks.description: Submit the GIR to the central jurisdiction tax authority portal and obtain filing confirmation.

checklist.text: Submit GIR via central jurisdiction portal

evidence.name: Filed GIR (XML or PDF)
evidence.description: Copy of the submitted GloBE Information Return in XML or PDF format.

evidence.name: GIR filing receipt
evidence.description: Official filing receipt or confirmation from the central jurisdiction tax authority.

evidence.name: Entity and jurisdiction data pack
evidence.description: Workbook or data pack containing entity-level data used to populate the GIR.

evidence.name: GIR validation report
evidence.description: Schema validation output confirming the GIR file passes technical checks.

evidence.name: Filing entity designation confirmation
evidence.description: Evidence confirming the UPE or DFE designation for central filing.

evidence.name: Competent authority agreement evidence
evidence.description: Evidence that qualifying competent authority agreements are in place, where required.

evidence.name: Senior review sign-off
evidence.description: Internal sign-off by the senior tax reviewer or authorised signatory.

evidence.name: GIR data reconciliation
evidence.description: Reconciliation of GIR data to source financial statements and local returns.

evidence.name: External adviser review memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo reviewing GIR content and filing approach, where relevant.

evidence.name: Constituent entity list
evidence.description: Complete list of constituent entities covered by the central filing.

evidence.name: GIR preparation workbook
evidence.description: Working papers and calculations used to prepare the GIR.

evidence.name: Data quality checks
evidence.description: Evidence of data quality checks performed on source data before GIR preparation.

evidence.name: Cross-jurisdiction consistency check
evidence.description: Check that GIR data is consistent with local return filings across jurisdictions.

evidence.name: GIR filing timeline tracker
evidence.description: Internal tracker documenting key milestones and deadlines for the GIR filing process.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Any correspondence with the tax authority regarding the GIR filing.

templates.description: File the GloBE Information Return locally in a constituent entity jurisdiction where central filing does not apply.

tasks.name: Confirm local GIR requirement
tasks.description: Verify that the jurisdiction requires a local GIR filing and identify the filing entity and deadline.

checklist.text: Verify jurisdiction requires local GIR filing
Confirm local filing format and portal

tasks.name: Prepare local GIR
tasks.description: Adapt the group-wide GIR data for the local jurisdiction format and complete the filing form.

checklist.text: Adapt group-wide GIR data for local format
Complete local GIR form or XML

tasks.name: Review and file local GIR
tasks.description: Review the local GIR for accuracy and submit via the local jurisdiction portal.

checklist.text: Senior review of local GIR content

evidence.name: Local GIR filed (XML or PDF)
evidence.description: Copy of the filed local GIR in the jurisdiction-specific format.

evidence.name: Local GIR filing receipt
evidence.description: Official filing receipt from the local tax authority.

evidence.name: Local GIR data workbook
evidence.description: Working papers showing how group-wide data was adapted for the local filing.

evidence.name: Local validation report
evidence.description: Schema or format validation output for the local GIR file.

evidence.name: Senior review sign-off
evidence.description: Internal sign-off by the reviewer confirming accuracy of the local GIR.

evidence.name: Consistency check to central GIR
evidence.description: Reconciliation confirming local GIR data is consistent with the central GIR, where relevant.

evidence.name: External adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo on local filing requirements, if applicable.

evidence.name: Local filing entity confirmation
evidence.description: Confirmation of the entity filing locally and its authority to do so.

evidence.name: Local format mapping notes
evidence.description: Notes documenting any differences between the OECD standard GIR format and the local format.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Correspondence with the local tax authority about the GIR filing.

evidence.name: Filing timeline tracker
evidence.description: Internal tracker documenting milestones for the local GIR process.

evidence.name: Data quality checks
evidence.description: Evidence of data quality checks performed on local source data.

templates.description: Notify the local tax authority that the GloBE Information Return has been or will be filed centrally in another jurisdiction.

tasks.name: Confirm notification requirement
tasks.description: Verify the jurisdiction requires a GIR notification and identify the deadline and required content.

tasks.name: Prepare notification
tasks.description: Draft the notification letter or form confirming where the GIR has been filed centrally.

checklist.text: Draft notification confirming central filing jurisdiction
Include details of filing entity and filing date

tasks.name: Submit notification
tasks.description: Submit the GIR notification via the local portal or by other prescribed means and obtain confirmation.

checklist.text: Submit notification via local portal or email
Obtain confirmation of receipt, where available

evidence.name: Notification letter or form submitted
evidence.description: Copy of the submitted notification letter or completed form.

evidence.name: Notification receipt
evidence.description: Confirmation from the tax authority that the notification was received, where available.

evidence.name: Central filing confirmation reference
evidence.description: Reference to the central GIR filing receipt confirming the GIR was filed.

evidence.name: Internal approval of notification
evidence.description: Internal sign-off confirming the notification content and timing.

evidence.name: Filing entity designation evidence
evidence.description: Evidence of the designated filing entity for the central GIR.

evidence.name: Notification deadline tracker
evidence.description: Internal tracker documenting the notification deadline and submission date.

evidence.name: Adviser memo on notification requirements
evidence.description: External adviser memo summarising notification requirements, where relevant.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Any correspondence with the tax authority about the notification.

evidence.name: Notification process notes
evidence.description: Internal notes documenting the notification process and any issues.

evidence.name: Historical notification log
evidence.description: Log of previous GIR notifications for this jurisdiction.

templates.description: Notify the domestic authority that a filing has been made in a foreign jurisdiction on behalf of the group.

tasks.name: Confirm foreign lodgment notification requirement
tasks.description: Verify the jurisdiction requires notification of a foreign lodgment and identify the deadline.

checklist.text: Verify jurisdiction requires foreign lodgment notification

tasks.name: Prepare and submit foreign lodgment notification
tasks.description: Draft and submit the notification confirming where the filing was made.

checklist.text: Draft notification confirming filing location and entity
Submit via local portal or prescribed method

evidence.name: Foreign lodgment notification submitted
evidence.description: Copy of the submitted notification form or letter.

evidence.name: Filing receipt or confirmation
evidence.description: Receipt or confirmation from the tax authority, where available.

evidence.name: Foreign filing reference
evidence.description: Reference to the foreign filing that triggered the notification.

evidence.name: Internal approval
evidence.description: Internal sign-off confirming the notification content.

evidence.name: Notification deadline tracker
evidence.description: Internal tracker documenting the notification deadline.

evidence.name: Adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo on foreign lodgment notification requirements, if applicable.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Correspondence with the tax authority about the notification.

evidence.name: Process notes
evidence.description: Internal notes documenting the notification workflow.

templates.description: Monitor whether the centrally filed GIR has been exchanged to the local jurisdiction via the automatic exchange mechanism.

tasks.name: Monitor GIR exchange status
tasks.description: Track whether the GIR filed centrally has been exchanged to the local jurisdiction and escalate if not received within the expected timeframe.

checklist.text: Check local jurisdiction portal for received GIR
Confirm GIR has been exchanged within expected timeframe
Escalate if GIR not received within expected period
Document exchange status and any actions taken

evidence.name: Exchange status confirmation
evidence.description: Evidence confirming whether the GIR has been exchanged to the local jurisdiction.

evidence.name: Portal screenshot or receipt
evidence.description: Screenshot or receipt from the local portal showing the GIR exchange status.

evidence.name: Escalation record
evidence.description: Record of any escalation actions taken if the GIR was not received.

evidence.name: Central filing receipt reference
evidence.description: Reference to the central filing receipt confirming when the GIR was submitted.

evidence.name: Exchange timeline tracker
evidence.description: Internal tracker documenting expected and actual exchange dates.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Correspondence with local or central authorities regarding the exchange.

evidence.name: Monitoring process notes
evidence.description: Internal notes documenting the monitoring process.

templates.description: Assess whether a fallback GIR filing is required in the local jurisdiction because the central GIR was not exchanged within the prescribed timeframe.

tasks.name: Assess fallback GIR filing risk
tasks.description: Determine whether the centrally filed GIR has been exchanged, and assess whether the jurisdiction requires a fallback local filing.

checklist.text: Determine if GIR was filed centrally
Check if GIR has been exchanged to local jurisdiction
Review local legislation for fallback filing trigger
Assess whether fallback filing is triggered

tasks.name: Prepare fallback GIR filing if required
tasks.description: If fallback filing is triggered, prepare and submit a local GIR filing.

checklist.text: Prepare local GIR filing as fallback
Submit fallback filing via local portal

evidence.name: Fallback filing assessment memo
evidence.description: Memo documenting the assessment of whether fallback filing is required.

evidence.name: Exchange status evidence
evidence.description: Evidence showing whether the GIR was or was not exchanged.

evidence.name: Local legislation reference
evidence.description: Reference to the local legislation defining fallback filing triggers.

evidence.name: Fallback GIR filing (if required)
evidence.description: Copy of the fallback GIR filing, if the assessment concluded it was required.

evidence.name: Fallback filing receipt
evidence.description: Filing receipt for the fallback GIR, if filed.

evidence.name: Internal decision record
evidence.description: Record of the internal decision on whether to file or not.

evidence.name: External adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo on fallback filing risk, where relevant.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Correspondence with the tax authority regarding fallback filing.

templates.description: Assess the optimal GIR filing route for the group, considering central vs local filing options, eligible filing entities, and exchange agreements.

tasks.name: Assess GIR filing route options
tasks.description: Evaluate the available filing routes (central UPE, DFE, local) and document the recommended approach.

checklist.text: Evaluate central vs local filing options
Consider exchange agreements and notification requirements
Document filing route decision and rationale

evidence.name: GIR filing route assessment memo
evidence.description: Memo documenting the analysis of available filing routes and the recommended approach.

evidence.name: Filing entity eligibility analysis
evidence.description: Analysis of which entities are eligible to file centrally (UPE, DFE).

evidence.name: Exchange agreement summary
evidence.description: Summary of qualifying competent authority agreements relevant to the filing route.

evidence.name: Internal decision record
evidence.description: Record of the internal decision on the chosen GIR filing route.

evidence.name: Notification obligation mapping
evidence.description: Mapping of which jurisdictions require GIR notifications under the chosen route.

evidence.name: Jurisdiction-by-jurisdiction filing summary
evidence.description: Table summarising the filing method (central, local, notification) for each jurisdiction.

evidence.name: External adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo on filing route options, where relevant.

evidence.name: Board or CFO briefing note
evidence.description: Briefing note for the board or CFO summarising the filing route decision.

templates.description: Assess whether the group qualifies for one or more transitional or permanent safe harbour provisions and prepare supporting documentation.

tasks.name: Identify applicable safe harbours
tasks.description: Review the available safe harbour provisions (transitional CbCR, QDMTT, simplified calculations) and determine which may apply.

checklist.text: Identify transitional CbCR safe harbour eligibility
Review permanent safe harbour provisions, where applicable

tasks.name: Collect safe harbour data
tasks.description: Gather the financial data needed for the safe harbour tests, including CbCR data and simplified ETR calculations.

checklist.text: Extract CbCR data for relevant jurisdictions
Collect revenue and profit data for de minimis test

tasks.name: Apply safe harbour tests
tasks.description: Run the safe harbour tests (de minimis, simplified ETR, routine profits) and document the results.

tasks.name: Review and approve safe harbour assessment
tasks.description: Senior review of the safe harbour assessment results and sign-off.

checklist.text: Senior review of safe harbour results

evidence.name: Safe harbour assessment summary
evidence.description: Summary document showing which safe harbours were tested and the pass/fail result for each jurisdiction.

evidence.name: CbCR data extract
evidence.description: Extract of Country-by-Country Report data used for the transitional CbCR safe harbour.

evidence.name: De minimis test workbook
evidence.description: Workbook showing the de minimis test calculations for each jurisdiction.

evidence.name: Simplified ETR test workbook
evidence.description: Workbook showing the simplified ETR test calculations.

evidence.name: Routine profits test workbook
evidence.description: Workbook showing the routine profits test calculations.

evidence.name: Senior review sign-off
evidence.description: Internal sign-off approving the safe harbour assessment results.

evidence.name: Safe harbour claim form or disclosure
evidence.description: Formal safe harbour claim or disclosure submitted to the tax authority, where required.

evidence.name: Jurisdiction-by-jurisdiction results table
evidence.description: Table showing the safe harbour test results for each jurisdiction.

evidence.name: External adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo on safe harbour eligibility, where relevant.

evidence.name: CbCR reconciliation to financial statements
evidence.description: Reconciliation of CbCR data to audited financial statements.

evidence.name: Historical safe harbour log
evidence.description: Log of safe harbour claims made in prior years.

evidence.name: Safe harbour data quality checks
evidence.description: Evidence of data quality checks on CbCR and financial data.

templates.description: Prepare and file a local additional information report required by the jurisdiction as a supplement to the GIR or top-up tax return.

tasks.name: Confirm reporting requirement
tasks.description: Verify the jurisdiction requires a local additional information report and identify the content, format, and deadline.

checklist.text: Verify local reporting requirement and deadline

tasks.name: Collect local data
tasks.description: Gather jurisdiction-specific data required for the additional report.

checklist.text: Collect jurisdiction-specific entity and financial data

tasks.name: Prepare report
tasks.description: Prepare the additional information report in the required format.

checklist.text: Cross-check to GIR and/or return data

tasks.name: Review and approve
tasks.description: Senior review of the additional information report.

tasks.name: Submit report
tasks.description: Submit the additional information report to the local tax authority.

checklist.text: Submit via local portal or prescribed method

evidence.name: Filed report (PDF or electronic)
evidence.description: Copy of the submitted additional information report.

evidence.name: Filing receipt
evidence.description: Official filing receipt from the tax authority.

evidence.name: Local data workbook
evidence.description: Workbook containing jurisdiction-specific data used to prepare the report.

evidence.name: Consistency check to GIR / return
evidence.description: Reconciliation showing data consistency with the GIR and/or top-up tax return.

evidence.name: Senior review sign-off
evidence.description: Internal sign-off by the senior reviewer.

evidence.name: Local adjustments schedule
evidence.description: Schedule of jurisdiction-specific adjustments included in the report.

evidence.name: Local legislation reference
evidence.description: Reference to the local legislation requiring this report.

evidence.name: Source data pack
evidence.description: Pack of source financial data used to prepare the report.

evidence.name: External adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo on local reporting requirements, where relevant.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Correspondence with the tax authority regarding this report.

evidence.name: Report preparation working papers
evidence.description: Detailed working papers for the report preparation.

evidence.name: Data quality checks
evidence.description: Evidence of data quality checks on local source data.

templates.description: Generic compliance workflow for obligations without a specific template. Provides core tasks and evidence items applicable to any Pillar 2 obligation.

tasks.name: Review obligation requirements
tasks.description: Identify the statutory requirements, deadline, and responsible party for this obligation.

tasks.name: Prepare submission
tasks.description: Gather the required information and complete the submission form or document.

tasks.name: Submit
tasks.description: Submit via the appropriate channel and obtain confirmation.

evidence.name: Submission confirmation
evidence.description: Official confirmation or receipt from the authority confirming the submission was received.

evidence.name: Submitted document (copy)
evidence.description: Copy of the document or form that was submitted.

evidence.name: Internal approval
evidence.description: Internal sign-off confirming the submission was reviewed and approved.

evidence.name: Supporting documentation
evidence.description: Any supporting documentation prepared for the submission.

evidence.name: Legislation reference
evidence.description: Reference to the legislation requiring this obligation.

evidence.name: Source data
evidence.description: Source data used to prepare the submission.

evidence.name: External adviser memo
evidence.description: External adviser memo on the obligation, where relevant.

evidence.name: Authority correspondence
evidence.description: Correspondence with the authority regarding this obligation.

evidence.name: Process notes
evidence.description: Internal notes documenting the submission process.
